title: myodocarpus gracilis
intro: Myodocarpus gracilis, also known as the 'sensitive plant', is a species of flowering plant in the Fabaceae family, characterized by its sensitive leaves that fold up when touched. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of M. gracilis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antifungal properties. M. gracilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues.
